modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty playing a DVD on the classroom computer.

full_description_text: The user was trying to play a DVD in the smart classroom at USD Main Campus. They called for help because they couldn't figure out how to get it to work. It seems like they needed some guidance on using the classroom computer for this task.
short_description: Difficulty playing a DVD on the classroom computer.
description: The user was trying to play a DVD in the smart classroom at USD Main Campus. They called for help because they couldn't figure out how to get it to work. It seems like they needed some guidance on using the classroom computer for this task.
